headline: Waste Connections Appoints Daniel L. Florness to its Board of Directors
summary: TORONTO, March 18, 2026--Waste Connections, Inc. (TSX/NYSE: WCN) ("Waste Connections" or the "Company") today announced that Daniel L. Florness has been appointed to its Board of Directors, effective April 1, 2026.
